mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (video_id, user_id, parent_id, root_id, reply_to_user_id, content, create_time, deleted) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET root_id = ? WHERE id = ?
mapper.select: SELECT id, video_id AS videoId, user_id AS userId, parent_id AS parentId, root_id AS rootId, reply_to_user_id AS replyToUserId, content, create_time AS createTime, like_count AS likesCount, reply_count AS replyCount, hot_score AS hotScore, deleted FROM comments WHERE id = ? AND deleted = 0 FOR UPDATE

SELECT c.id, c.video_id AS videoId, c.user_id AS userId, c.parent_id AS parentId, c.root_id AS rootId, c.reply_to_user_id AS replyToUserId, c.content, c.create_time AS createTime, c.like_count AS likesCount, c.reply_count AS replyCount, c.hot_score AS hotScore, c.deleted, u.username AS username, u.nickname AS nickname FROM comments c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = ? ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = ?
UPDATE comments SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count + ?, 0), hot_score = like_count * 3 + reply_count * 5 + GREATEST(0, 100 - TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, create_time, NOW())) WHERE id = ?
UPDATE comments SET reply_count = reply_count + 1, hot_score = like_count * 3 + reply_count * 5 + GREATEST(0, 100 - TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, create_time, NOW())) WHERE id = ?

UPDATE videos SET comment_count = comment_count + 1, hot_score = like_count * 3 + comment_count * 5 + favorite_count * 4 + view_count + GREATEST(0, 100 - TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, create_time, NOW())) WHERE id = ?
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE video_id = ? AND parent_id IS NULL

SELECT c.id, c.video_id AS videoId, c.user_id AS userId, c.parent_id AS parentId, c.root_id AS rootId, c.reply_to_user_id AS replyToUserId, c.content, c.create_time AS createTime, c.like_count AS likesCount, c.reply_count AS replyCount, c.hot_score AS hotScore, c.deleted, u.username AS username, u.nickname AS nickname, ru.username AS replyToUsername, ru.nickname AS replyToNickname FROM comments c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.video_id = ? AND c.parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT ?, ?

SELECT c.id, c.video_id AS videoId, c.user_id AS userId, c.parent_id AS parentId, c.root_id AS rootId, c.reply_to_user_id AS replyToUserId, c.content, c.create_time AS createTime, c.like_count AS likesCount, c.reply_count AS replyCount, c.hot_score AS hotScore, c.deleted, u.username AS username, u.nickname AS nickname, ru.username AS replyToUsername, ru.nickname AS replyToNickname FROM comments c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.video_id = ? AND c.parent_id IS NULL AND (? IS NULL OR c.create_time < ? OR (c.create_time = ? AND c.id < ?)) ORDER BY c.create_time DESC, c.id DESC LIMIT ?

SELECT c.id, c.video_id AS videoId, c.user_id AS userId, c.parent_id AS parentId, c.root_id AS rootId, c.reply_to_user_id AS replyToUserId, c.content, c.create_time AS createTime, c.like_count AS likesCount, c.reply_count AS replyCount, c.hot_score AS hotScore, c.deleted, u.username AS username, u.nickname AS nickname, ru.username AS replyToUsername, ru.nickname AS replyToNickname FROM comments c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.video_id = ? AND c.parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY c.hot_score DESC, c.create_time DESC LIMIT ?, ?

SELECT c.id, c.video_id AS videoId, c.user_id AS userId, c.parent_id AS parentId, c.root_id AS rootId, c.reply_to_user_id AS replyToUserId, c.content, c.create_time AS createTime, c.like_count AS likesCount, c.reply_count AS replyCount, c.hot_score AS hotScore, c.deleted, u.username AS username, u.nickname AS nickname, ru.username AS replyToUsername, ru.nickname AS replyToNickname FROM comments c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.video_id = ? AND c.parent_id IS NULL AND (? IS NULL OR c.hot_score < ? OR (c.hot_score = ? AND c.create_time < ?) OR (c.hot_score = ? AND c.create_time = ? AND c.id < ?)) ORDER BY c.hot_score DESC, c.create_time DESC, c.id DESC LIMIT ?

SELECT c.id, c.video_id AS videoId, c.user_id AS userId, c.parent_id AS parentId, c.root_id AS rootId, c.reply_to_user_id AS replyToUserId, c.content, c.create_time AS createTime, c.like_count AS likesCount, c.reply_count AS replyCount, c.hot_score AS hotScore, c.deleted, u.username AS username, u.nickname AS nickname, ru.username AS replyToUsername, ru.nickname AS replyToNickname FROM comments c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.root_id IN (%s) AND c.parent_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
